Click any highlighted token and classify it. Sensitive tokens drain the Data Leak Integrity meter until redacted — if it hits 0%, mission fails. Tokens that pose no risk can be dismissed as SAFE to slow the drain rate. Misclassifying sensitive data as SAFE results in a −10% integrity penalty. Use the Vulnerability Scan tool if you need a hint.
